title: Playground Object Ledger
concept: A saved-object control center that treats temporary, browser-saved, and local-directory Playgrounds as first-class ledger objects while every save, rename, delete, Blueprint, settings, import, and export event mutates the same active shell.
focus: saved object ledger with temporary, browser, and local identities
event stream and transfer ledger as first-class operation feedback
stored settings Save & Reload versus temporary reset behavior
protected live WordPress shell beside dense object controls
flows: Select a representative Blueprint from the honestly labeled 43-entry gallery subset, inspect JSON, validate it, confirm replacement, run progress, and update the selected Playground, path, preview, event stream, and transfer ledger

Change WordPress, PHP, language, network, older-version, and multisite settings, preview temporary reset consequences, confirm Save & Reload for a stored object, show progress, and update the runtime badge
Save the temporary Playground in browser storage with file-copy progress, slug identity, saved row mutation, and refresh-safe browser consequence
Save to a local directory with folder picker cancellation, folder permission consequence, local identity, and reconnect-after-refresh copy
Rename a selected saved Playground and delete a selected saved Playground with confirmation, row removal, and active fallback to Unsaved Playground
Create or import through Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, and .zip import routes with route-specific inputs and constraints
Use Site Manager files, Blueprint, database, logs, Export to GitHub, and Download as zip while the live WordPress shell remains visible
featureCoverage: Vanilla WordPress start route
WordPress PR preview input
Gutenberg PR or branch input
GitHub import with account connection and token-not-stored consequence
Blueprint URL runner
Import .zip route with validation and replacement warning
Blueprint gallery categories and search with honest representative subset of 43
Featured Blueprint shortcuts with captured names
Blueprint JSON editor with validation, copy, download, run, replacement warning, progress, and result state
Save temporary Playground in browser storage
Save to a local directory with folder permission and reconnect consequence
Save progress with file counts
Saved, local-directory, and unsaved Playground object differences
Saved Playground open, manage, rename, delete confirmation, row removal, and fallback state
Current shell path input and refresh
Homepage and WP Admin shortcuts
Temporary and saved shell states
Settings for WordPress version, older versions, PHP version, language, network access, and multisite
Destructive unsaved reset warning and stored Save & Reload behavior
File browser with create file, create folder, upload, browse, selected editor, dirty, and save result states
Database driver, SQLite path, size, database download, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin
Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs with empty and warning states
Export to GitHub
Download as zip
Transfer history for GitHub, ZIP, database, Blueprint, settings, save, rename, delete, and file actions
